title: Audit Factory Seed
mutation_thesis: Maximize breadth-first issue harvesting with strict triage templates.
operator_workflow_delta: Front-load contract surface enumeration and standardized triage queues.
likely_weaknesses: can miss deep state-path edge cases
admissible_risk: medium false-positive risk if triage heuristics are over-broad
evidence_strategy: structured finding templates with reproducible pointers
likely_archive_contribution: structured triage queues, severity calibration tables, reviewer packet templates
